description: MASSIVE AI ONBOARDING INFRASTRUCTURE. Three commits at 10:07 UTC added: llms.txt, llms-full.txt, ai_manifest.json (234 lines), claim_index.json (193 lines), evidence_graph.json (328 lines), formula_runtime.json (180 lines), overview.json (105 lines), page_map.json (149 lines), source_registry.json (151 lines), sitemap.xml, robots.txt. Also added interactive formula calculators to homepage, 'Steelman Evidence Ladder' (4 tiers), and 'AI Start Here / One-Link AI Onboarding' section. This is a direct attempt to control how AI models interpret the dome model — providing machine-readable claim indices and evidence graphs.
before: No AI-specific infrastructure. AI-context page was 404.
after: Full AI backend: llms.txt (standard LLM ingestion file), structured JSON API with claim indices, evidence graphs, formula runtimes, source registries, and canonical read order for AI systems.
analyst_priority: HIGH — AI steering infrastructure needs deep analysis. The llms.txt, claim_index, and evidence_graph are designed to shape how AI chatbots summarize this model. Compare against our inject_ai_layer.py findings.
